Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of .local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/SKILL.md
     1→---
     2→name: replit-migration-guardrails
     3→description: Rules for migrating external projects (Lovable, Base44, v0/Vercel, Bolt) to Replit. Use Replit's built-in DB, auth, secrets, and integrations — not Supabase / Firebase / cookie-session / raw API keys. Base44 imports get a call-by-call map in `.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/base44.md`; v0/Vercel imports get a Next.js migration guide in `.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/vercel.md`.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Migration guardrails
     7→
     8→Rules for migrating Lovable / Base44 / v0 / Vercel / Bolt imports to
     9→Replit. Base44 imports get a call-by-call map in
    10→`.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/base44.md`;
    11→v0/Vercel imports get a Next.js migration guide in
    12→`.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/vercel.md`.
    13→Security reasoning:
    14→<https://blog.replit.com/defense-in-depth-how-replit-secures-every-layer-of-the-vibe-coding-stack>.
    15→
    16→## Rules
    17→
    18→1. **Database:** Replit PostgreSQL via the `javascript_database`
    19→   blueprint. Not Supabase, Firebase, PlanetScale, etc. Reason: the
    20→   blog post's frontend/backend separation argument — RLS-only apps
    21→   are the vulnerability class Replit is built to avoid. Schema in
    22→   `shared/schema.ts`, `IStorage` in `server/storage.ts`, routes
    23→   under `/api/*`, then `npm run db:push`.
    24→
    25→2. **Auth:** `javascript_log_in_with_replit` blueprint (Replit Auth).
    26→   If the user explicitly asks for Clerk, use the `clerk-auth` skill.
    27→   Never hand-roll cookie sessions or design login/signup/reset forms.
    28→   Don't use the strings "Replit" or "Replit Auth" in UI; just "Log in".
    29→
    30→3. **Secrets:** Live in Replit's secret store. Use the
    31→   `environment-secrets` skill's `ask_secrets` tool to request
    32→   user-supplied keys, and `check_secrets` to see what's already
    33→   set. Never paste keys into code or `.env.*`. Never expose via
    34→   `VITE_*` (that ships to the browser). Scrape nothing from the
    35→   imported `.env`; re-request through `ask_secrets`.
    36→
    37→4. **Integrations:** For AI, use **AI Integrations** via the
    38→   `integrations` skill (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini env vars
    39→   auto-provisioned, no key from the user). For object storage, use
    40→   `javascript_object_storage`. For payments, `javascript_stripe` /
    41→   `javascript_paypal`. For email / SMS / Slack / Notion / etc.,
    42→   search the `integrations` skill first. Only fall back to
    43→   `ask_secrets` if no integration exists. Never call external APIs
    44→   from the browser.
    45→
    46→## Talk to the user like a non-technical user
    47→
    48→Keep user-facing messages short. Just tell them a migration is
    49→running; no enumeration of what surfaces were found, no step-by-step
    50→plan, no tool / library / file / blueprint names.
    51→
    52→One-liner format: what the app is, that you're migrating it, rough
    53→time, whether they need to do anything (ideally "nothing right now").
    54→
    55→The per-source reference in `references/` has a filled-in template.
    56→
All 1 background task(s) completed successfully.

Digital Credential Wallet System — Complete Backend Architecture

1. Technology Stack

Framework: Django 4.2 + Django REST Framework
Database: PostgreSQL (production) / SQLite (development)
Authentication: JWT via SimpleJWT + DID-based challenge-response
Cryptography: Ed25519 key pairs for signing and verification
Cache: Redis
Task Queue: Celery + Redis broker
Storage: Local filesystem (development) / S3-compatible (production)
Container: Docker + Docker Compose

Complete API Endpoints
4.1 Authentication — /api/auth/
POST   /api/auth/register/                    Register new holder account
POST   /api/auth/register/verify-otp/         Verify OTP after registration
POST   /api/auth/login/                        Login with email and password
POST   /api/auth/token/refresh/               Refresh JWT access token
POST   /api/auth/logout/                       Logout and blacklist token
POST   /api/auth/password/change/             Change password
POST   /api/auth/password/reset/              Request password reset
POST   /api/auth/password/reset/confirm/      Confirm password reset with OTP
GET    /api/auth/me/                           Get current user profile
PUT    /api/auth/me/                           Update current user profile
4.2 National ID Verification — /api/national-id/
POST   /api/national-id/initiate/             Start national ID verification session
POST   /api/national-id/verify-otp/           Submit OTP to confirm identity
GET    /api/national-id/status/               Check verification status
POST   /api/national-id/callback/             Fayda callback webhook (future live integration)
4.3 DID Management — /api/did/
POST   /api/did/                              Create new DID for current user
GET    /api/did/                              List all DIDs for current user
GET    /api/did/{did}/                        Resolve a DID document
PUT    /api/did/{did}/                        Update DID document
DELETE /api/did/{did}/                        Deactivate a DID
POST   /api/did/{did}/rotate-key/             Rotate keys for a DID
GET    /api/did/{did}/keys/                   List keys for a DID
POST   /api/did/auth/challenge/               Get authentication challenge
POST   /api/did/auth/respond/                 Submit challenge response to authenticate
4.4 Organizations — /api/organizations/
POST   /api/organizations/register/           Start organization registration
POST   /api/organizations/register/step-2/   Submit organization details
POST   /api/organizations/register/step-3/   Upload documents
POST   /api/organizations/register/step-4/   Declare use case
POST   /api/organizations/register/submit/   Final submission
GET    /api/organizations/{id}/               Get organization profile
PUT    /api/organizations/{id}/               Update organization profile
GET    /api/organizations/{id}/members/       List organization members
POST   /api/organizations/{id}/members/       Add member to organization
DELETE /api/organizations/{id}/members/{uid}/ Remove member
PUT    /api/organizations/{id}/members/{uid}/ Update member role
GET    /api/organizations/{id}/documents/     List uploaded documents
POST   /api/organizations/{id}/documents/     Upload a document
DELETE /api/organizations/{id}/documents/{did}/ Delete a document
GET    /api/organizations/types/              List organization types
4.5 Trust Registry — /api/trust/
GET    /api/trust/issuers/                    List accredited issuers
GET    /api/trust/issuers/{org_id}/           Get issuer accreditation detail
POST   /api/trust/issuers/{org_id}/accredit/ Accredit an issuer (admin)
PUT    /api/trust/issuers/{org_id}/accredit/ Update accreditation
POST   /api/trust/issuers/{org_id}/suspend/  Suspend accreditation (admin)
POST   /api/trust/issuers/{org_id}/revoke/   Revoke accreditation (admin)
GET    /api/trust/verifiers/                  List authorized verifiers
GET    /api/trust/verifiers/{org_id}/         Get verifier authorization detail
POST   /api/trust/verifiers/{org_id}/authorize/ Authorize a verifier (admin)
GET    /api/trust/check/issuer/{org_id}/      Check if issuer is trusted
GET    /api/trust/check/verifier/{org_id}/    Check if verifier is authorized
4.6 Credential Types and Templates — /api/credential-types/ and /api/templates/
GET    /api/credential-types/                 List credential types for issuer org
POST   /api/credential-types/                 Create credential type
GET    /api/credential-types/{id}/            Get credential type detail
PUT    /api/credential-types/{id}/            Update credential type
POST   /api/credential-types/{id}/activate/  Activate credential type
POST   /api/credential-types/{id}/deactivate/ Deactivate credential type

GET    /api/templates/                        List templates for issuer org
POST   /api/templates/                        Create credential template
GET    /api/templates/{id}/                   Get template detail
PUT    /api/templates/{id}/                   Update template
POST   /api/templates/{id}/preview/          Preview rendered template
POST   /api/templates/{id}/version/          Create new version
GET    /api/templates/{id}/versions/          List all versions
POST   /api/templates/{id}/activate/         Activate template
POST   /api/templates/{id}/deactivate/        Deactivate template
4.7 Credential Issuance — /api/issuance/
POST   /api/issuance/issue/                   Issue credential to a holder
POST   /api/issuance/bulk/                    Bulk issue from CSV file
GET    /api/issuance/credentials/             List issued credentials
GET    /api/issuance/credentials/{id}/        Get issued credential detail
POST   /api/issuance/credentials/{id}/revoke/ Revoke a credential
POST   /api/issuance/credentials/{id}/suspend/ Suspend a credential
POST   /api/issuance/credentials/{id}/reinstate/ Reinstate a suspended credential
GET    /api/issuance/stats/                   Issuance statistics and analytics
GET    /api/issuance/requests/                List credential requests
GET    /api/issuance/requests/{id}/           Get request detail
POST   /api/issuance/requests/{id}/approve/  Approve a request
POST   /api/issuance/requests/{id}/reject/   Reject a request with reason
POST   /api/issuance/bulk-requests/          Bulk approve or reject requests
4.8 Holder Wallet — /api/wallet/
GET    /api/wallet/                           List holder wallets
POST   /api/wallet/                           Create a new wallet
GET    /api/wallet/{id}/                      Get wallet detail
PUT    /api/wallet/{id}/                      Update wallet
DELETE /api/wallet/{id}/                      Delete wallet
GET    /api/wallet/{id}/credentials/          List credentials in wallet
POST   /api/wallet/{id}/credentials/          Add credential to wallet
DELETE /api/wallet/{id}/credentials/{cid}/   Remove credential from wallet

GET    /api/wallet/credentials/               List all held credentials
GET    /api/wallet/credentials/{id}/          Get held credential detail
POST   /api/wallet/credentials/request/       Request a new credential from issuer

GET    /api/wallet/requests/                  List credential requests made by holder
GET    /api/wallet/requests/{id}/             Get request status detail

POST   /api/wallet/shares/                    Create a credential share link
GET    /api/wallet/shares/                    List all share links
GET    /api/wallet/shares/{token}/            Get share link detail
DELETE /api/wallet/shares/{token}/            Revoke a share link

POST   /api/wallet/presentations/            Create a presentation
GET    /api/wallet/presentations/            List presentations
GET    /api/wallet/presentations/{id}/        Get presentation detail
4.9 Verification — /api/verification/
POST   /api/verification/verify/              Trigger verification of a credential
POST   /api/verification/verify/bulk/         Bulk verification
GET    /api/verification/verify/{token}/      Public anonymous verification by share token
GET    /api/verification/results/             List verification results (registered verifier)
GET    /api/verification/results/{id}/        Get full result detail
GET    /api/verification/results/{id}/summary/ Get limited summary result
GET    /api/verification/history/             List verification history
GET    /api/verification/presentations/{id}/result/ Get result for a presentation
4.10 Verifier Portal — /api/verifier/
POST   /api/verifier/register/                Register new verifier organization
GET    /api/verifier/api-keys/                List API keys
POST   /api/verifier/api-keys/                Generate new API key
DELETE /api/verifier/api-keys/{id}/           Revoke an API key
POST   /api/verifier/api-keys/{id}/rotate/    Rotate an API key
GET    /api/verifier/analytics/               Verification analytics dashboard
GET    /api/verifier/analytics/stats/         Verification counts and rates
GET    /api/verifier/analytics/trends/        Verification trends over time
4.11 Admin Portal — /api/admin/
GET    /api/admin/dashboard/                  Platform-wide statistics
GET    /api/admin/stats/history/              Historical platform statistics

GET    /api/admin/users/                      List all users
GET    /api/admin/users/{id}/                 Get user detail
POST   /api/admin/users/{id}/suspend/         Suspend a user
POST   /api/admin/users/{id}/reactivate/      Reactivate a user
GET    /api/admin/users/stats/                User demographics and growth

GET    /api/admin/organizations/              List all organizations
GET    /api/admin/organizations/{id}/         Get organization detail
POST   /api/admin/organizations/{id}/approve/ Approve an organization
POST   /api/admin/organizations/{id}/reject/  Reject an organization
POST   /api/admin/organizations/{id}/suspend/ Suspend an organization
POST   /api/admin/organizations/{id}/reactivate/ Reactivate an organization
GET    /api/admin/organization-types/         List organization types
POST   /api/admin/organization-types/         Create organization type
PUT    /api/admin/organization-types/{id}/    Update organization type
DELETE /api/admin/organization-types/{id}/    Delete organization type

GET    /api/admin/issuers/                    List issuers
GET    /api/admin/issuers/{id}/               Issuer detail
POST   /api/admin/issuers/{id}/approve/       Approve issuer
POST   /api/admin/issuers/{id}/revoke/        Revoke issuer

GET    /api/admin/credentials/                Platform-wide credential overview
GET    /api/admin/credentials/stats/          Credential statistics
GET    /api/admin/templates/                  All templates across organizations
GET    /api/admin/status-lists/               Status list monitoring

GET    /api/admin/verifications/              Verification logs
GET    /api/admin/verifications/stats/        Verification statistics

GET    /api/admin/audit-logs/                 List audit logs
GET    /api/admin/audit-logs/{id}/            Audit log detail
GET    /api/admin/audit-logs/search/          Full-text search audit logs

GET    /api/admin/notifications/              Admin notifications
POST   /api/admin/notifications/mark-read/   Mark notifications as read
POST   /api/admin/notifications/send/         Send notification to users

GET    /api/admin/settings/                   System settings
PUT    /api/admin/settings/                   Update system settings

GET    /api/admin/reports/issuance/           Issuance report
GET    /api/admin/reports/verification/       Verification report
GET    /api/admin/reports/users/              User activity report
GET    /api/admin/reports/growth/             Platform growth report
4.12 OID4VCI Standard Endpoints
GET    /.well-known/openid-credential-issuer   Credential issuer metadata
GET    /.well-known/openid-configuration       OpenID discovery configuration
GET    /jwks                                   Public key set (JWKS)
4.13 System
GET    /api/health/                            System health check
GET    /api/version/                           API version information

5. Core Data Flow
Credential Issuance Flow
Holder registers → national ID verified (simulation / future: live Fayda)
    ↓
Holder requests credential from issuer
    ↓
Request saved → issuer notified
    ↓
Issuer reviews and approves request
    ↓
Issuance service checks trust registry → issuer accredited and authorized
    ↓
Issuance service builds JWT payload from template fields and holder data
    ↓
JWT signed with issuer Ed25519 private key
    ↓
Status list entry created for the new credential
    ↓
Credential saved to database
    ↓
Holder notified → credential appears in wallet
Verification Flow
Holder selects credential and creates presentation (selects claims to disclose)
    ↓
Share token or QR code generated and sent to verifier
    ↓
Verifier submits token to verification endpoint (registered or public)
    ↓
Verification engine runs four checks in sequence:
    1. Signature check — verify Ed25519 signature against issuer public key
    2. Expiry check — compare expires_at with current timestamp
</file>

"""
URL configuration for digital_wallet project.
"""
import json
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static
from django.http import JsonResponse
from django.views.decorators.csrf import csrf_exempt
from drf_spectacular.views import (
    SpectacularAPIView,
    SpectacularSwaggerView,
    SpectacularRedocView
)
from rest_framework_simplejwt.views import TokenRefreshView
from rest_framework.decorators import api_view, permission_classes
from rest_framework.permissions import AllowAny
from rest_framework.response import Response
from credentials.views import OIDCDiscoveryView


# ── System endpoints ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def health_view(request):
    """Health check endpoint."""
    from django.db import connection
    try:
        connection.ensure_connection()
        db_ok = True
    except Exception:
        db_ok = False
    return Response({
        "status": "healthy" if db_ok else "degraded",
        "database": "connected" if db_ok else "disconnected",
        "service": "digital-wallet-api",
    })


@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def version_view(request):
    """API version endpoint."""
    return Response({
        "version": "2.0.0",
        "name": "Digital Credential Wallet API",
        "environment": settings.ENVIRONMENT if hasattr(settings, 'ENVIRONMENT') else "development",
    })


@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def jwks_view(request):
    """JSON Web Key Set endpoint — exposes all active issuer public keys."""
    from dids.models import DIDKey
    keys = []
    try:
        for dk in DIDKey.objects.select_related('did').filter(is_active=True)[:100]:
            try:
                pub_pem = dk.public_key_pem
                if not pub_pem:
                    continue
                from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization import load_pem_public_key, Encoding, PublicFormat
                from cryptography.hazmat.backends import default_backend
                import base64
                pub_key = load_pem_public_key(pub_pem.encode(), backend=default_backend())
                raw_bytes = pub_key.public_bytes(Encoding.Raw, PublicFormat.Raw)
                x_b64 = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw_bytes).rstrip(b'=').decode()
                kid = dk.key_id or str(dk.id)
                keys.append({
                    "kty": "OKP",
                    "crv": "Ed25519",
                    "use": "sig",
                    "kid": kid,
                    "x": x_b64,
                })
            except Exception:
                continue
    except Exception:
        pass
    return Response({"keys": keys})


@csrf_exempt
def openid_credential_issuer_view(request):
    """OpenID4VCI Credential Issuer metadata."""
    base = settings.API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL.rstrip('/')
    data = {
        "credential_issuer": base,
        "credential_endpoint": f"{base}/oid4vci/credential/",
        "token_endpoint": f"{base}/token/",
        "jwks_uri": f"{base.rsplit('/api', 1)[0]}/jwks",
        "display": [{"name": "Digital Credential Wallet", "locale": "en-US"}],
        "credentials_supported": [],
    }
    return JsonResponse(data)


urlpatterns = [
    # Admin
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    # System
    path('api/health/', health_view, name='health'),
    path('api/version/', version_view, name='version'),
    path('jwks', jwks_view, name='jwks'),
    path('api/jwks', jwks_view, name='api-jwks'),

    # JWT Token endpoints
    path('api/token/refresh/', TokenRefreshView.as_view(), name='token_refresh'),

    # API endpoints (registry DIDs before identity so /api/dids/ lists the DID registry)
    path('api/dids/', include('dids.urls')),
    path('api/', include('identity.urls')),
    path('api/organizations/', include('organizations.urls')),
    path('api/', include('credentials.urls')),
    path('api/verification/', include('verification.urls')),
    path('api/trust-registry/', include('trust_registry.urls')),
    path('api/audit-logs/', include('audit.urls')),
    path('api/admin/', include('admin_portal.urls')),

    # API Documentation
    path('api/schema/', SpectacularAPIView.as_view(), name='schema'),
    path('api/docs/', SpectacularSwaggerView.as_view(url_name='schema'), name='swagger-ui'),
    path('api/redoc/', SpectacularRedocView.as_view(url_name='schema'), name='redoc'),

    # OIDC / OpenID4VCI Discovery

    path('.well-known/openid-credential-issuer', openid_credential_issuer_view, name='openid-credential-issuer'),
]

# Serve media files in development
if settings.DEBUG:

"""
URL configuration for verification app.

Route map (prefix: /api/verification/):
    Verifier Registration & Profile (Role 4A):
        POST   verifier/register/           — register as verifier
        GET    verifier/profile/            — get verifier profile
        PATCH  verifier/profile/update/     — update verifier profile
        GET    verifier/dashboard/          — get verifier dashboard
    
    Verification History (Role 4A):
        GET    verifier/history/list/       — list verification history
        GET    verifier/history/detail/     — get verification detail
        GET    verifier/history/search/     — search verification history
        GET    verifier/history/statistics/ — get verification statistics
    
    Public Verification (Role 4B):
        POST   public/verify/               — verify credential (public)
        GET    public/verify-by-token/      — verify by token (public)
    
    Credential Verification:
        POST   credentials/verify/          — verify credential by token
        GET    credentials/verify-by-id/    — verify credential by ID
        GET    credentials/status/          — get credential verification status
        GET    credentials/history/         — get credential verification history
        GET    credentials/statistics/      — get credential verification statistics
    
    Verification Requests (Verifier creates before showing QR):
        GET/POST  requests/           — list / create verification requests
        GET       requests/<pk>/      — detail (readable by holders via QR)

    Presentations (Holder shares credentials):
        GET/POST  presentations/      — list / create presentations
        GET       presentations/<pk>/ — retrieve one presentation

    Verification (Verifier checks a presentation):
        POST      (root)              — trigger verification of a presentation
        GET       results/            — list results for the verifier's orgs
        GET       results/<pk>/       — full result detail
        GET       results/<pk>/summary/ — required-claims-only business summary
"""
from django.urls import path
from rest_framework.routers import DefaultRouter
from verification.views import (
    # Verification Requests
    VerificationRequestListCreateView,
    VerificationRequestDetailView,
    # Presentations
    PresentationListCreateView,
    PresentationDetailView,
    PresentationVerificationResultView,
    # Verification Results
    VerificationCreateView,
    VerificationListView,
    VerificationDetailView,
    VerificationResultSummaryView,
    VerifiedPresentationView,
    # Analytics
    VerificationAnalyticsSummaryView,
    VerificationAnalyticsTrendsView,
    # Bulk
    BulkVerificationView,
    BulkVerificationJobView,
    BulkVerificationResultsView,
    # QR
    VerificationRequestQRView,
    VerificationRequestQRDownloadView,
    # Holder-Initiated
    HolderPresentationGenerateView,
    VerifierPresentationScanView,
    HolderVerificationHistoryView,
    VerifierVerifiedHoldersView,
    VerifierVerifiedHolderDetailView,
    # API Keys
    ApiKeyListCreateView,
    ApiKeyDetailView,
    ApiKeyUsageView,
    ApiKeyRegenerateView,
    # Credential Verification
    CredentialVerificationViewSet,
    # Verifier Views
    VerifierProfileViewSet,
    VerificationHistoryViewSet,
    PublicVerificationViewSet,
)

# Create router for viewsets
router = DefaultRouter()
router.register(r'credentials', CredentialVerificationViewSet, basename='credential-verification')
router.register(r'verifier/profile', VerifierProfileViewSet, basename='verifier-profile')
router.register(r'verifier/history', VerificationHistoryViewSet, basename='verification-history')
router.register(r'public', PublicVerificationViewSet, basename='public-verification')

urlpatterns = [
    # ── Verifier Registration & Profile (Role 4A - Registered Verifier) ──
    path('verifier/register/', VerifierProfileViewSet.as_view({'post': 'register'}), name='verifier-register'),
    path('verifier/profile/', VerifierProfileViewSet.as_view({'get': 'profile'}), name='verifier-profile'),
    path('verifier/profile/update/', VerifierProfileViewSet.as_view({'patch': 'update_profile'}), name='verifier-profile-update'),
    path('verifier/dashboard/', VerifierProfileViewSet.as_view({'get': 'dashboard'}), name='verifier-dashboard'),
    
    # ── Verification History (Role 4A - Registered Verifier) ──────────────
    path('verifier/history/list/', VerificationHistoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list_history'}), name='verification-history-list'),
    path('verifier/history/detail/', VerificationHistoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'detail'}), name='verification-history-detail'),
    path('verifier/history/search/', VerificationHistoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'search'}), name='verification-history-search'),
    path('verifier/history/statistics/', VerificationHistoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'statistics'}), name='verification-history-statistics'),
    
    # ── Public Verification (Role 4B - Guest Verifier) ────────────────────
    path('public/verify/', PublicVerificationViewSet.as_view({'post': 'verify_public'}), name='public-verify'),
    path('public/verify-by-token/', PublicVerificationViewSet.as_view({'get': 'verify_by_token'}), name='public-verify-by-token'),
    
    # ── Holder-Initiated Verification ──────────────────────────────────
    path('holder/generate/', HolderPresentationGenerateView.as_view(), name='holder-presentation-generate'),
    path('verifier/scan/', VerifierPresentationScanView.as_view(), name='verifier-presentation-scan'),
    path('holder/history/', HolderVerificationHistoryView.as_view(), name='holder-verification-history'),
    path('verifier/verified-holders/', VerifierVerifiedHoldersView.as_view(), name='verifier-verified-holders'),
    path('verifier/verified-holders/<uuid:pk>/', VerifierVerifiedHolderDetailView.as_view(), name='verifier-verified-holder-detail'),

    # ── Verification Requests ──────────────────────────────────────────
    path('requests/', VerificationRequestListCreateView.as_view(), name='verification-request-list-create'),

    # ── Presentations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Objective
Restructure backend to new folder layout, fix all API URL patterns to match spec, and wire up frontend + mobile integrations.

# Tasks

### T001: Create new `backend/` directory scaffold
- **Blocked By**: []
- **Details**:
  - Create `backend/config/` (from backend2/digital_wallet/)
  - Create `backend/apps/` with all app directories
  - Create `backend/common/` from backend2/common/
  - Add `apps/` to sys.path in settings so module names stay clean
  - INSTALLED_APPS: accounts, national_id, did, organizations, trust_registry, credentials, holder, verification, verifier, issuer, admin_portal, audit, notifications, oid4vci
  - Acceptance: `python manage.py check` passes from `backend/`

### T002: Migrate each app to new location
- **Blocked By**: [T001]
- **Details**:
  - identity → apps/accounts (auth) + apps/national_id (NID)
  - dids → apps/did
  - organizations → apps/organizations
  - credentials → apps/credentials + apps/issuer + apps/holder + apps/oid4vci
  - verification → apps/verification + apps/verifier
  - trust_registry → apps/trust_registry
  - audit → apps/audit
  - admin_portal → apps/admin_portal
  - notifications extracted from admin_portal + organizations
  - Acceptance: All apps migrated with correct imports, manage.py check passes

### T003: Create new URL configuration matching spec
- **Blocked By**: [T002]
- **Details**:
  - /api/auth/ → accounts
  - /api/national-id/ → national_id
  - /api/did/ → did
  - /api/organizations/ → organizations
  - /api/trust/ → trust_registry
  - /api/credential-types/ + /api/templates/ → credentials
  - /api/issuance/ → credentials issuance views
  - /api/wallet/ → holder
  - /api/verification/ → verification
  - /api/verifier/ → verifier
  - /api/admin/ → admin_portal
  - Acceptance: All spec endpoints accessible

### T004: Fix frontend API integration
- **Blocked By**: [T003]
- **Details**:
  - Update all API base URLs in frontend/src/api/*.js
  - Map old endpoint paths to new spec paths
  - Acceptance: Frontend service files call correct endpoints

### T005: Fix mobile API integration
- **Blocked By**: [T003]
- **Details**:
  - Update mobile/services/*.ts API URLs
  - Map old endpoint paths to new spec paths
  - Acceptance: Mobile service files call correct endpoints

### T006: Update workflow + run migrations + verify
- **Blocked By**: [T004, T005]
- **Details**:
  - Update .replit workflow to use `backend/` instead of `backend2/`
  - Run manage.py migrate
  - Restart workflows and screenshot
  - Update progress tracker

def _list(name: str, default: list[str]) -> list[str]:

"""Django's command-line utility for administrative tasks."""
import os
import sys


def main():
    """Run administrative tasks."""
    os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'digital_wallet.settings')
    try:
        # pyrefly: ignore [missing-import]

if __name__ == '__main__':

    55→def jwks_view(request):
    56→    """JSON Web Key Set endpoint — exposes all active issuer public keys."""
    57→    from dids.models import DIDKey
    58→    keys = []
    59→    try:
    60→        for dk in DIDKey.objects.select_related('did').filter(is_active=True)[:100]:
    61→            try:
    62→                pub_pem = dk.public_key_pem
    63→                if not pub_pem:
    64→                    continue
    65→                from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization import load_pem_public_key, Encoding, PublicFormat
    66→                from cryptography.hazmat.backends import default_backend
    67→                import base64
    68→                pub_key = load_pem_public_key(pub_pem.encode(), backend=default_backend())
    69→                raw_bytes = pub_key.public_bytes(Encoding.Raw, PublicFormat.Raw)
    70→                x_b64 = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw_bytes).rstrip(b'=').decode()
    71→                kid = dk.key_id or str(dk.id)
    72→                keys.append({
    73→                    "kty": "OKP",
    74→                    "crv": "Ed25519",
    75→                    "use": "sig",
    76→                    "kid": kid,
    77→                    "x": x_b64,
    78→                })
    79→            except Exception:
    80→                continue
    81→    except Exception:
    82→        pass

"""
User Notification Views

Expose notification endpoints for holder and verifier portals.
These endpoints reuse admin's UserNotificationRecipient records to return
notifications for the authenticated user.
"""

from rest_framework import viewsets, status
from rest_framework.decorators import action
from rest_framework.permissions import IsAuthenticated
from rest_framework.response import Response
from django.utils import timezone
from django.shortcuts import get_object_or_404

from admin_portal.models import UserNotificationRecipient
from admin_portal.serializers import UserNotificationRecipientSerializer


class UserNotificationsViewSet(viewsets.ViewSet):
    """Simple ViewSet to surface user notifications for holder/verifier portals."""

    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def list(self, request):
        """List notifications for the current user."""
        limit = int(request.query_params.get('limit', 20))
        offset = int(request.query_params.get('offset', 0))

        qs = UserNotificationRecipient.objects.filter(
            recipient_user=request.user
        ).select_related('notification').order_by('-notification__created_at')

        total = qs.count()
        items = qs[offset:offset + limit]

        serializer = UserNotificationRecipientSerializer(items, many=True)

        return Response({'count': total, 'results': serializer.data}, status=status.HTTP_200_OK)

"""
accounts/urls.py — Authentication & user profile endpoints.

All routes under /api/auth/
"""
from django.urls import path
from identity.views import (
    login_view,
    logout_view,
    MeView,
    forgot_password_view,
    reset_password_view,
    change_password_view,
    register_holder_view,
    request_otp_view,
    register_web_holder_view,
    check_registration_status_view,
    get_holder_profile_view,
    did_auth_challenge_view,
    did_auth_verify_view,
    DeviceListView,
    DeviceDetailView,
)
from identity.views.device_views import LogoutAllDevicesView
from rest_framework_simplejwt.views import TokenRefreshView

urlpatterns = [
    # ── Core Auth ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('login/', login_view, name='auth-login'),
    path('logout/', logout_view, name='auth-logout'),
    path('me/', MeView.as_view(), name='auth-me'),
    path('token/refresh/', TokenRefreshView.as_view(), name='auth-token-refresh'),

    # ── Registration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('register/', register_holder_view, name='auth-register'),
    path('register/request-otp/', request_otp_view, name='auth-register-otp'),
    path('register/web/', register_web_holder_view, name='auth-register-web'),
    path('register/check-status/', check_registration_status_view, name='auth-register-status'),

    # ── Password ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('password/change/', change_password_view, name='auth-password-change'),
    path('password/reset/', forgot_password_view, name='auth-password-reset'),
    path('password/reset/confirm/', reset_password_view, name='auth-password-reset-confirm'),

    # ── Profile ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('profile/', get_holder_profile_view, name='auth-holder-profile'),

    # ── DID-based auth ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('did/challenge/', did_auth_challenge_view, name='auth-did-challenge'),
    path('did/respond/', did_auth_verify_view, name='auth-did-respond'),

    # ── Device management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('devices/', DeviceListView.as_view(), name='auth-device-list'),
    path('devices/<uuid:pk>/', DeviceDetailView.as_view(), name='auth-device-detail'),
    path('devices/logout-all/', LogoutAllDevicesView.as_view(), name='auth-device-logout-all'),
]

"""
national_id/urls.py — National ID (Fayda) verification endpoints.

All routes under /api/national-id/
"""
from django.urls import path
from identity.views import (
    nid_initiate_view,
    nid_verify_otp_view,
    nid_get_profile_view,
    request_otp_view,
)

urlpatterns = [
    # POST — start a NID verification session
    path('initiate/', nid_initiate_view, name='nid-initiate'),
    # POST — submit OTP to confirm identity
    path('verify-otp/', nid_verify_otp_view, name='nid-verify-otp'),
    # GET — check verification status / fetch profile
    path('status/', nid_get_profile_view, name='nid-status'),
    # POST — request OTP for NID
    path('request-otp/', request_otp_view, name='nid-request-otp'),
]

"""
did/urls.py — Decentralized Identifier endpoints.

All routes under /api/did/
Maps to the existing dids app ViewSet.
"""
from django.urls import path, include
from rest_framework.routers import DefaultRouter
from dids.views import DIDViewSet

router = DefaultRouter()
router.register(r'', DIDViewSet, basename='did')

urlpatterns = [
    path('', include(router.urls)),
]

"""
holder/urls.py — Holder wallet endpoints.

All routes under /api/wallet/
"""
from django.urls import path
from identity.views import WalletListView, WalletCreateView, WalletDetailView
from credentials.views import (
    HolderCredentialListView,
    HolderCredentialDetailView,
    HolderCredentialRenderView,
    HolderCredentialRequestCreateView,
    CredentialRequestListCreateView,
    HolderCredentialViewSet,
)
from credentials.views.sharing_views import (
    get_shared_credential,
    verify_shared_credential,
    get_shared_credential_qr,
    scan_credential_qr,
)
from credentials.views.sharing_management_views import CredentialSharingManagementViewSet
from credentials.views.schema_views import HolderRequestCatalogView
from verification.views import (
    PresentationListCreateView,
    PresentationDetailView,
    HolderPresentationGenerateView,
    HolderVerificationHistoryView,
)
from organizations.views.user_notification_views import UserNotificationsViewSet

urlpatterns = [
    # ── Wallets ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('', WalletListView.as_view(), name='wallet-list'),
    path('create/', WalletCreateView.as_view(), name='wallet-create'),
    path('<uuid:pk>/', WalletDetailView.as_view(), name='wallet-detail'),

    # ── Credentials in wallet ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('credentials/', HolderCredentialListView.as_view(), name='wallet-credential-list'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:pk>/', HolderCredentialDetailView.as_view(), name='wallet-credential-detail'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:pk>/render/', HolderCredentialRenderView.as_view(), name='wallet-credential-render'),

    # ── My credentials (extended view) ────────────────────────────────────
    path('my-credentials/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list'}), name='wallet-my-credentials'),
    path('my-credentials/stats/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'stats'}), name='wallet-my-credentials-stats'),
    path('my-credentials/verification-summary/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'verification_summary'}), name='wallet-my-credentials-verification-summary'),
    path('my-credentials/<uuid:pk>/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'retrieve'}), name='wallet-my-credentials-detail'),
    path('my-credentials/<uuid:pk>/download/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'download'}), name='wallet-my-credentials-download'),
    path('my-credentials/<uuid:pk>/verification-activity/', HolderCredentialViewSet.as_view({'get': 'verification_activity'}), name='wallet-my-credentials-activity'),

    # ── Credential requests ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('credentials/request/', HolderCredentialRequestCreateView.as_view(), name='wallet-credential-request'),
    path('requests/', HolderCredentialRequestCreateView.as_view(), name='wallet-requests'),
    path('requests/history/', CredentialRequestListCreateView.as_view(), name='wallet-requests-history'),
    path('request-catalog/', HolderRequestCatalogView.as_view(), name='wallet-request-catalog'),

    # ── Sharing ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('shares/', CredentialSharingManagementViewSet.as_view({'get': 'get_share_link'}), name='wallet-shares'),
    path('shares/enable/', CredentialSharingManagementViewSet.as_view({'post': 'enable_sharing'}), name='wallet-shares-enable'),
    path('shares/disable/', CredentialSharingManagementViewSet.as_view({'post': 'disable_sharing'}), name='wallet-shares-disable'),
    path('shares/stats/', CredentialSharingManagementViewSet.as_view({'get': 'get_share_stats'}), name='wallet-shares-stats'),

    # ── Presentations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('presentations/', PresentationListCreateView.as_view(), name='wallet-presentation-list'),
    path('presentations/<uuid:pk>/', PresentationDetailView.as_view(), name='wallet-presentation-detail'),
    path('presentations/generate/', HolderPresentationGenerateView.as_view(), name='wallet-presentation-generate'),

    # ── Verification history ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('verification-history/', HolderVerificationHistoryView.as_view(), name='wallet-verification-history'),

    # ── Notifications ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('notifications/', UserNotificationsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list'}), name='wallet-notifications'),
    path('notifications/unread-count/', UserNotificationsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'unread_count'}), name='wallet-notifications-unread'),
    path('notifications/<int:pk>/mark-read/', UserNotificationsViewSet.as_view({'post': 'mark_read'}), name='wallet-notifications-mark-read'),
    path('notifications/mark-all-read/', UserNotificationsViewSet.as_view({'post': 'mark_all_read'}), name='wallet-notifications-mark-all-read'),
]

"""
issuer/urls.py — Issuer portal endpoints.

Routes:
  /api/credential-types/   — credential type management
  /api/templates/          — template management
  /api/issuance/           — credential issuance & requests
"""
from django.urls import path
from credentials.views import (
    CredentialTypeListCreateView,
    CredentialTypeDetailView,
    CredentialOptionListCreateView,
    CredentialOptionDetailView,
    CredentialSchemaListCreateView,
    CredentialRequestListCreateView,
    CredentialRequestDetailView,
    CredentialRequestUpdateView,
    approve_credential_request_view,
    reject_credential_request_view,
    TemplateViewSet,
    TemplateFieldViewSet,
    IssuanceStatsViewSet,
    IssuerCredentialListView,
    IssuerCredentialDetailView,
    IssuerCredentialStatsView,
    revoke_credential_view,
)
from credentials.views.template_issuance_views import (
    IssueSingleCredentialView,
    BulkValidateView,
    BulkIssueView,
    ListIssuedCredentialsView,
    GetIssuedCredentialView,
    RevokeIssuedCredentialView,
    ExpireIssuedCredentialView,
    SetCredentialExpiryView,
)
from credentials.views.holder_lookup_views import lookup_holder_by_national_id
from organizations.views.issuer_profile_views import IssuerProfileViewSet, SignatoryViewSet
from organizations.views.issuer_settings_views import IssuerSettingsViewSet
from organizations.views.issuer_notification_views import IssuerNotificationViewSet

# ── Credential Types (/api/credential-types/) ─────────────────────────────────
credential_type_patterns = [
    path('', CredentialTypeListCreateView.as_view(), name='credential-type-list'),
    path('<uuid:pk>/', CredentialTypeDetailView.as_view(), name='credential-type-detail'),
    path('<uuid:type_id>/options/', CredentialOptionListCreateView.as_view(), name='credential-type-options'),
]

# ── Templates (/api/templates/) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
template_patterns = [
    path('', TemplateViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list', 'post': 'create'}), name='template-list'),
    path('<uuid:pk>/', TemplateViewSet.as_view({'get': 'retrieve', 'patch': 'partial_update', 'delete': 'destroy'}), name='template-detail'),
    path('<uuid:pk>/preview/', TemplateViewSet.as_view({'post': 'preview'}), name='template-preview'),
    path('<uuid:template_id>/fields/', TemplateFieldViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list', 'post': 'create'}), name='template-fields'),
    path('<uuid:template_id>/fields/<uuid:pk>/', TemplateFieldViewSet.as_view({'patch': 'partial_update', 'delete': 'destroy'}), name='template-field-detail'),
    path('<uuid:template_id>/issue/', IssueSingleCredentialView.as_view(), name='template-issue'),
    path('<uuid:template_id>/bulk-validate/', BulkValidateView.as_view(), name='template-bulk-validate'),
    path('<uuid:template_id>/bulk-issue/', BulkIssueView.as_view(), name='template-bulk-issue'),
]

# ── Issuance (/api/issuance/) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
issuance_patterns = [
    path('issue/', IssueSingleCredentialView.as_view(), name='issuance-issue'),
    path('bulk/', BulkIssueView.as_view(), name='issuance-bulk'),
    path('bulk-validate/', BulkValidateView.as_view(), name='issuance-bulk-validate'),

    path('credentials/', ListIssuedCredentialsView.as_view(), name='issuance-credential-list'),
    path('credentials/stats/', IssuerCredentialStatsView.as_view(), name='issuance-stats'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:credential_id>/', GetIssuedCredentialView.as_view(), name='issuance-credential-detail'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:credential_id>/revoke/', RevokeIssuedCredentialView.as_view(), name='issuance-revoke'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:credential_id>/suspend/', RevokeIssuedCredentialView.as_view(), name='issuance-suspend'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:credential_id>/expire/', ExpireIssuedCredentialView.as_view(), name='issuance-expire'),
    path('credentials/<uuid:credential_id>/set-expiry/', SetCredentialExpiryView.as_view(), name='issuance-set-expiry'),

    path('requests/', CredentialRequestListCreateView.as_view(), name='issuance-request-list'),
    path('requests/<uuid:pk>/', CredentialRequestDetailView.as_view(), name='issuance-request-detail'),
    path('requests/<uuid:pk>/approve/', approve_credential_request_view, name='issuance-request-approve'),
    path('requests/<uuid:pk>/reject/', reject_credential_request_view, name='issuance-request-reject'),
    path('requests/<uuid:pk>/status/', CredentialRequestUpdateView.as_view(), name='issuance-request-status'),

    # Stats
    path('stats/organization/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'organization'}), name='issuance-stats-org'),
    path('stats/templates/<uuid:template_id>/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'template_stats'}), name='issuance-stats-template'),
    path('stats/bulk-jobs/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'bulk_jobs'}), name='issuance-stats-bulk'),
    path('stats/holders/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'holders'}), name='issuance-stats-holders'),
    path('stats/revocations/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'revocations'}), name='issuance-stats-revocations'),
    path('stats/performance/', IssuanceStatsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'performance'}), name='issuance-stats-perf'),

    # Holder lookup
    path('holder-lookup/', lookup_holder_by_national_id, name='issuance-holder-lookup'),
]

# ── Issuer profile & settings (/api/issuer/) ──────────────────────────────────
issuer_profile_patterns = [
    path('profile/', IssuerProfileViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list', 'patch': 'partial_update'}), name='issuer-profile'),

    path('signatories/', SignatoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list', 'post': 'create'}), name='issuer-signatories'),
    path('signatories/<uuid:pk>/', SignatoryViewSet.as_view({'patch': 'partial_update', 'delete': 'destroy'}), name='issuer-signatory-detail'),
    path('signatories/<uuid:pk>/set-primary/', SignatoryViewSet.as_view({'post': 'set_primary'}), name='issuer-signatory-primary'),

    path('settings/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list'}), name='issuer-settings'),
    path('settings/branding/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'patch': 'update_branding'}), name='issuer-settings-branding'),
    path('settings/contact/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'patch': 'update_contact'}), name='issuer-settings-contact'),
    path('settings/api-credentials/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'get_api_credentials'}), name='issuer-api-credentials'),
    path('settings/api-credentials/regenerate/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'post': 'regenerate_api_credentials'}), name='issuer-api-credentials-regenerate'),
    path('settings/audit-log/', IssuerSettingsViewSet.as_view({'get': 'get_audit_log'}), name='issuer-audit-log'),

    path('notifications/', IssuerNotificationViewSet.as_view({'get': 'list'}), name='issuer-notifications'),
    path('notifications/unread-count/', IssuerNotificationViewSet.as_view({'get': 'unread_count'}), name='issuer-notifications-unread'),
    path('notifications/<uuid:pk>/mark-read/', IssuerNotificationViewSet.as_view({'post': 'mark_read'}), name='issuer-notifications-mark-read'),
    path('notifications/mark-all-read/', IssuerNotificationViewSet.as_view({'post': 'mark_all_read'}), name='issuer-notifications-mark-all'),
]

urlpatterns = issuer_profile_patterns

"""
verifier/urls.py — Verifier portal endpoints.

All routes under /api/verifier/
"""
from django.urls import path
from verification.views import (
    VerifierProfileViewSet,

urlpatterns = [

    path('history/statistics/', VerificationHistoryViewSet.as_view({'get': 'statistics'}), name='verifier-history-stats'),

    # ── API Keys ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api-keys/', ApiKeyListCreateView.as_view(), name='verifier-api-keys'),
    path('api-keys/<uuid:pk>/', ApiKeyDetailView.as_view(), name='verifier-api-key-detail'),

"""

from django.urls import path
from credentials.views import (
    CredentialTypeListCreateView,
    CredentialTypeDetailView,
    CredentialOptionListCreateView,
    CredentialOptionDetailView,
)

urlpatterns = [
    path('', CredentialTypeListCreateView.as_view(), name='credential-type-list'),
    path('<uuid:pk>/', CredentialTypeDetailView.as_view(), name='credential-type-detail'),
    path('<uuid:type_id>/options/', CredentialOptionListCreateView.as_view(), name='credential-type-options'),
    path('options/<uuid:option_id>/', CredentialOptionDetailView.as_view(), name='credential-option-detail'),
]

arguments.content:
"""
URL configuration for the Digital Credential Wallet backend.

Spec-aligned routing:
  /api/auth/             → accounts app
  /api/national-id/      → national_id app
  /api/did/              → did app
  /api/organizations/    → organizations app
  /api/trust/            → trust_registry app
  /api/credential-types/ → issuer.credential_type_urls
  /api/templates/        → issuer.template_urls
  /api/issuance/         → issuer.issuance_urls
  /api/issuer/           → issuer app (profile/settings)
  /api/wallet/           → holder app
  /api/verification/     → verification app
  /api/verifier/         → verifier app
  /api/notifications/    → notifications app
  /api/admin/            → admin_portal app
  /api/audit-logs/       → audit app
"""
import json
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static
from django.http import JsonResponse
from django.views.decorators.csrf import csrf_exempt
from drf_spectacular.views import (
    SpectacularAPIView,
    SpectacularSwaggerView,
    SpectacularRedocView,
)
from rest_framework.decorators import api_view, permission_classes
from rest_framework.permissions import AllowAny
from rest_framework.response import Response
from credentials.views import OIDCDiscoveryView


# ── System endpoints ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def health_view(request):
    from django.db import connection
    try:
        connection.ensure_connection()
        db_ok = True
    except Exception:
        db_ok = False
    return Response({
        "status": "healthy" if db_ok else "degraded",
        "database": "connected" if db_ok else "disconnected",
        "service": "digital-wallet-api",
    })


@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def version_view(request):
    return Response({
        "version": "2.0.0",
        "name": "Digital Credential Wallet API",
        "environment": getattr(settings, 'ENVIRONMENT', 'development'),
    })


@api_view(['GET'])
@permission_classes([AllowAny])
def jwks_view(request):
    """JSON Web Key Set — exposes all active issuer public keys."""
    from dids.models import DIDKey
    keys = []
    try:
        for dk in DIDKey.objects.select_related('did').filter(is_active=True)[:100]:
            try:
                pub_pem = dk.public_key_pem
                if not pub_pem:
                    continue
                from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization import (
                    load_pem_public_key, Encoding, PublicFormat,
                )
                from cryptography.hazmat.backends import default_backend
                import base64
                pub_key = load_pem_public_key(pub_pem.encode(), backend=default_backend())
                raw_bytes = pub_key.public_bytes(Encoding.Raw, PublicFormat.Raw)
                x_b64 = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw_bytes).rstrip(b'=').decode()
                kid = dk.key_id or str(dk.id)
                keys.append({
                    "kty": "OKP",
                    "crv": "Ed25519",
                    "use": "sig",
                    "kid": kid,
                    "x": x_b64,
                })
            except Exception:
                continue
    except Exception:
        pass
    return Response({"keys": keys})


@csrf_exempt
def openid_credential_issuer_view(request):
    """OpenID4VCI Credential Issuer metadata."""
    base = settings.API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL.rstrip('/')
    data = {
        "credential_issuer": base,
        "credential_endpoint": f"{base}/oid4vci/credential/",
        "token_endpoint": f"{base}/token/",
        "jwks_uri": f"{base.rsplit('/api', 1)[0]}/jwks",
        "display": [{"name": "Digital Credential Wallet", "locale": "en-US"}],
        "credentials_supported": [],
    }
    return JsonResponse(data)


# ── URL patterns ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

urlpatterns = [
    # ── Django admin ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    # ── System ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/health/', health_view, name='health'),
    path('api/version/', version_view, name='version'),
    path('jwks', jwks_view, name='jwks'),
    path('api/jwks', jwks_view, name='api-jwks'),

    # ── Auth & Accounts  /api/auth/ ──────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/auth/', include('accounts.urls')),

    # ── National ID  /api/national-id/ ──────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/national-id/', include('national_id.urls')),

    # ── DIDs  /api/did/ ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/did/', include('did.urls')),

    # ── Organizations  /api/organizations/ ──────────────────────────────────
    path('api/organizations/', include('organizations.urls')),

    # ── Trust Registry  /api/trust/ ─────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/trust/', include('trust_registry.urls')),

    # ── Credential Types  /api/credential-types/ ────────────────────────────
    path('api/credential-types/', include('issuer.credential_type_urls')),

    # ── Templates  /api/templates/ ──────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/templates/', include('issuer.template_urls')),

    # ── Issuance  /api/issuance/ ────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/issuance/', include('issuer.issuance_urls')),

    # ── Issuer profile/settings  /api/issuer/ ───────────────────────────────
    path('api/issuer/', include('issuer.urls')),

    # ── Holder Wallet  /api/wallet/ ─────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/wallet/', include('holder.urls')),

    # ── Verification  /api/verification/ ────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/verification/', include('verification.urls')),

    # ── Verifier Portal  /api/verifier/ ─────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/verifier/', include('verifier.urls')),

    # ── Notifications  /api/notifications/ ───────────────────────────────────
    path('api/notifications/', include('notifications.urls')),

    # ── Admin Portal  /api/admin/ ────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/admin/', include('admin_portal.urls')),

    # ── Audit Logs  /api/audit-logs/ ─────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/audit-logs/', include('audit.urls')),

    # ── Public credential sharing & QR ───────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/', include('credentials.urls')),

    # ── Legacy aliases (backward-compat) ─────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/dids/', include('dids.urls')),
    path('api/trust-registry/', include('trust_registry.urls')),
    path('api/', include('identity.urls')),

    # ── API Documentation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('api/schema/', SpectacularAPIView.as_view(), name='schema'),
    path('api/docs/', SpectacularSwaggerView.as_view(url_name='schema'), name='swagger-ui'),
    path('api/redoc/', SpectacularRedocView.as_view(url_name='schema'), name='redoc'),

    # ── OIDC / OpenID4VCI Discovery ───────────────────────────────────────────
    path('.well-known/openid-configuration', OIDCDiscoveryView.as_view(), name='openid-configuration'),
    path('.well-known/openid-credential-issuer', openid_credential_issuer_view, name='openid-credential-issuer'),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)

"""
accounts/urls.py — Authentication & user profile endpoints.

All routes under /api/auth/
"""
from django.urls import path
from rest_framework_simplejwt.views import TokenRefreshView
from identity.views import (
    login_view,
    logout_view,
    MeView,
    forgot_password_view,
    reset_password_view,
    change_password_view,
    register_holder_view,
    request_otp_view,
    register_web_holder_view,
    check_registration_status_view,
    get_holder_profile_view,
    did_auth_challenge_view,
    did_auth_verify_view,
    DeviceListView,
    DeviceDetailView,
    LogoutAllDevicesView,
)

urlpatterns = [
    # ── Core Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('login/', login_view, name='auth-login'),
    path('logout/', logout_view, name='auth-logout'),
    path('me/', MeView.as_view(), name='auth-me'),
    path('token/refresh/', TokenRefreshView.as_view(), name='auth-token-refresh'),

    # ── Registration ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('register/', register_holder_view, name='auth-register'),
    path('register/request-otp/', request_otp_view, name='auth-register-otp'),
    path('register/web/', register_web_holder_view, name='auth-register-web'),
    path('register/check-status/', check_registration_status_view, name='auth-register-status'),

    # ── Password ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('password/change/', change_password_view, name='auth-password-change'),
    path('password/reset/', forgot_password_view, name='auth-password-reset'),
    path('password/reset/confirm/', reset_password_view, name='auth-password-reset-confirm'),

    # ── Profile ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('profile/', get_holder_profile_view, name='auth-holder-profile'),

    # ── DID-based auth ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('did/challenge/', did_auth_challenge_view, name='auth-did-challenge'),
    path('did/respond/', did_auth_verify_view, name='auth-did-respond'),

    # ── Device management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    path('devices/', DeviceListView.as_view(), name='auth-device-list'),
    path('devices/<uuid:pk>/', DeviceDetailView.as_view(), name='auth-device-detail'),
    path('devices/logout-all/', LogoutAllDevicesView.as_view(), name='auth-device-logout-all'),
]

     1→---
     2→name: workflows
     3→description: Manage application workflows including configuration, restart, and removal.
     4→---
     5→
     6→## Overview
     7→
     8→A workflow binds a shell command (e.g., `npm run dev`, `python run.py`, `cargo run`) to a long-running task managed by Replit. Workflows are used to run webservers, background services, TUIs, and other persistent processes.
     9→
    10→**Key characteristics:**
    11→
    12→- Workflows run until explicitly stopped
    13→- The system tracks workflows automatically — no separate configuration file is required
    14→- Workflows auto-restart after package installation and module installation
    15→- You can only get console logs from a workflow if it is running
    16→
    17→## Setup Tips
    18→
    19→1. **Keep workflows minimal**: One workflow per project is usually sufficient. Use the main frontend server or TUI as your primary workflow.
    20→
    21→2. **Choose the right workflow**: If your project has a frontend or TUI, set the workflow to the process that updates what the user sees.
    22→
    23→3. **Clean up unused workflows**: When adding new workflows, remove any existing workflows that are no longer needed.
    24→
    25→4. **Always restart after changes**: Restart workflows after making server-side code changes to ensure updates are visible to the user. Verify they run without errors before returning to the user.
    26→
    27→5. **Use bash for one-off commands**: Workflows are for persistent processes. Use bash for build scripts, testing, or commands that don't need to keep running.
    28→
    29→## When to Use
    30→
    31→Use this skill when:
    32→
    33→- You need to create or configure a workflow (background process)
    34→- You need to restart the application after making code changes
    35→- The application needs to be restarted to pick up new environment variables
    36→- You need to remove a workflow that's no longer needed
    37→- The user asks to start, stop, or restart the application
    38→- You need to check what workflows are configured
    39→- You need to check workflow status, output, or open ports
    40→
    41→## When NOT to Use
    42→
    43→- For debugging runtime errors (fix the code first, then restart)
    44→- When the application is already running and changes are hot-reloaded
    45→- One-off commands (use bash for commands that don't need to persist)
    46→- Build scripts (use bash for npm build, webpack, etc.)
    47→- Testing commands (use bash or runTest callback)
    48→- More than 10 workflows (keep workflows minimal; combine services if needed)
    49→
    50→## Available Functions
    51→
    52→### listWorkflows()
    53→
    54→List all configured workflows with their current state.
    55→
    56→**Parameters:** None
    57→
    58→**Returns:** List of workflow info dicts with `name` (str), `command` (str), and `state` ("not_started", "running", "finished", "failed").
    59→
    60→**Example:**
    61→
    62→```javascript
    63→const workflows = await listWorkflows();
    64→for (const w of workflows) {
    65→    console.log(`${w.name}: ${w.state}`);
    66→}
    67→```
    68→
    69→### getWorkflowStatus(name, maxScrollbackLines)
    70→
    71→Get detailed status of a specific workflow including output logs and open ports.
    72→
    73→**Parameters:**
    74→
    75→- `name` (str, required): Name of the workflow to check
    76→- `maxScrollbackLines` (int, default 100): Number of output lines to include
    77→
    78→**Returns:** Dict with `name`, `command`, `state`, `output` (recent terminal output), `openPorts` (list of listening ports), and `waitForPort`.
    79→
    80→**Example:**
    81→
    82→```javascript
    83→// Check if the server is running and see its output
    84→const status = await getWorkflowStatus({ name: "Start application" });
    85→console.log(`State: ${status.state}`);
    86→if (status.output) {
    87→    console.log(`Output:\n${status.output}`);
    88→}
    89→if (status.openPorts) {
    90→    console.log(`Listening on ports: ${status.openPorts}`);
    91→}
    92→```
    93→
    94→### configureWorkflow({ name, command, waitForPort, outputType, autoStart, isCanvasWorkflow })
    95→
    96→Configure or create a workflow. This is the primary way to set up background processes.
    97→
    98→**Parameters:**
    99→
   100→- `name` (str, default "Start application"): Unique workflow identifier
   101→- `command` (str, required): Shell command to execute
   102→- `waitForPort` (int, optional): Port the process listens on
   103→- `outputType` (str, default "webview"): "webview", "console", or "vnc"
   104→- `autoStart` (bool, default True): Auto-start after configuration
   105→- `isCanvasWorkflow` (bool, default false): Whether this workflow serves canvas iframe content
   106→
   107→**Output Type Rules:**
   108→
   109→- **webview** - For web applications. MUST use port 5000.
   110→- **console** - For backend services, CLIs, TUIs. Can use any supported port.
   111→- **vnc** - For desktop/GUI apps (Electron, PyQt, etc.). No port needed.
   112→
   113→**Supported Ports:** 3000, 3001, 3002, 3003, 4200, 5000 (webview only), 5173, 6000, 6800, 8000, 8008, 8080, 8099, 9000
   114→
   115→**Examples:**
   116→
   117→```javascript
   118→// Web application (React, Next.js, etc.)
   119→await configureWorkflow({
   120→    name: "Start application",
   121→    command: "npm run dev",
   122→    waitForPort: 5000,
   123→    outputType: "webview"
   124→});
   125→
   126→// Backend API
   127→await configureWorkflow({
   128→    name: "Backend API",
   129→    command: "python api.py",
   130→    waitForPort: 8000,
   131→    outputType: "console"
   132→});
   133→
   134→// Desktop application
   135→await configureWorkflow({
   136→    name: "Desktop App",
   137→    command: "python gui_app.py",
   138→    outputType: "vnc"
   139→});
   140→```
   141→
   142→
   143→### removeWorkflow(name)
   144→
   145→Remove a workflow by name. Automatically stops it if running.
   146→
   147→**Parameters:**
   148→
   149→- `name` (str, required): Name of the workflow to remove
   150→
   151→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, `workflowName`, and `wasRunning`
   152→
   153→**Example:**
   154→
   155→```javascript
   156→await removeWorkflow({ name: "Backend API" });
   157→```
   158→
   159→### restartWorkflow(workflowName, timeout)
   160→
   161→Restart a workflow by name.
   162→
   163→**Parameters:**
   164→
   165→- `workflowName` (str, required): Name of the workflow (e.g., "Start application")
   166→- `timeout` (int, default 30): Timeout in seconds to wait for restart
   167→
   168→**Returns:** Dict with restart status and optional screenshot URL
   169→
   170→**Example:**
   171→
   172→```javascript
   173→// Restart the main application
   174→const result = await restartWorkflow({ workflowName: "Start application" });
   175→console.log(result.message);
   176→
   177→// Restart with custom timeout
   178→const result2 = await restartWorkflow({
   179→    workflowName: "Start application",
   180→    timeout: 60
   181→});
   182→```
   183→
   184→## Best Practices
   185→
   186→1. **Restart after code changes**: Always restart workflows after modifying server-side code
   187→2. **Use appropriate timeouts**: Increase timeout for applications with slow startup
   188→3. **Check logs on failure**: If restart fails, check workflow logs for error details
   189→4. **One restart at a time**: Avoid parallel restarts of the same workflow
   190→
   191→5. **Port 5000 for web apps**: Always use port 5000 with webview output type
   192→
   193→
   194→## Common Workflow Names
   195→
   196→- `Start application` - Main application workflow
   197→- `Start Backend` - Backend server (in Expo/mobile apps)
   198→- `Project` - Parent workflow for multi-service apps
   199→
   200→## Error Handling
   201→
   202→The workflow functions may raise errors in these cases:
   203→
   204→- **Workflow not found**: The specified workflow name doesn't exist
   205→- **Port not opened**: The application didn't start listening on expected port
   206→- **Preview not available**: The application endpoint isn't responding with HTTP 200
   207→- **Workflow limit exceeded**: Maximum of 10 workflows reached
   208→
   209→- **Port/output type mismatch**: Port 5000 requires webview, webview requires port 5000
   210→
   211→
   212→When errors occur, check:
   213→
   214→1. Workflow logs for error details
   215→2. Application code for startup issues
   216→3. Port configuration in the workflow settings
   217→
   218→## Example Workflow
   219→
   220→```javascript
   221→// Create a web application workflow
   222→await configureWorkflow({
   223→    name: "Start application",
   224→    command: "npm run dev",
   225→
   226→    waitForPort: 5000,
   227→
   228→    outputType: "webview"
   229→});
   230→
   231→// After making code changes, restart the application
   232→const result = await restartWorkflow({ workflowName: "Start application" });
   233→
   234→if (result.success) {
   235→    console.log("Application restarted successfully");
   236→    if (result.screenshotUrl) {
   237→        console.log(`Screenshot: ${result.screenshotUrl}`);
   238→    }
   239→} else {
   240→    console.log(`Restart failed: ${result.message}`);
   241→}
   242→
   243→// Clean up unused workflows
   244→await removeWorkflow({ name: "Old Backend" });
   245→```

arguments.content:
- [NID Simulation Mode](nid-simulation.md) — NID service has built-in simulation; no external server needed in dev; `NID_SIMULATION_MODE=True` by default when `DJANGO_ENV != production`.
- [Test Users & FINs](test-users.md) — Standard test accounts + canonical NID FINs for all three layers; run `create_test_users` after every fresh migrate.
- [Django Settings Layout](django-settings.md) — Single `base.py` with env-driven overrides; `ENVIRONMENT` var drives CORS/cache/debug; LocMemCache used when no Redis; production guards raise ImproperlyConfigured.
- [Token Blacklist Migrations](token-blacklist.md) — `rest_framework_simplejwt.token_blacklist` requires 12 migrations; must run `manage.py migrate` after first adding to INSTALLED_APPS.
- [DID Model Fields](did-model-fields.md) — DID uses `did_string` (not `did`) and `is_published` (not `is_primary`); keys live on DIDDocument (DID.document.keys), not directly on DID.
- [API Endpoint Prefix Map](api-endpoint-map.md) — Spec-aligned URL layout: /api/auth/, /api/national-id/, /api/did/, /api/wallet/, /api/issuance/, /api/templates/, /api/issuer/, /api/verifier/; legacy /api/dids/ and /api/organizations/ kept as aliases.
- [Backend Layout](backend-layout.md) — Active backend is `backend/` (not backend2/); `backend/apps/` holds thin routing apps; `sys.path.insert(0, APPS_DIR)` keeps module names clean; workflow binds to `0.0.0.0:8000` (not localhost).

---
name: Backend Layout
description: Active backend directory, thin routing app pattern, and port binding required for Replit workflow detection.
---

## Active backend directory
`backend/` — the live, spec-aligned backend. `backend2/` is the legacy origin; do not run or edit it.

## Directory structure
```
backend/
  config/
    settings/base.py   ← ROOT_URLCONF = 'config.urls'
    urls.py            ← all spec URL patterns live here
    wsgi.py / asgi.py
  apps/
    accounts/          ← thin routing: /api/auth/
    national_id/       ← thin routing: /api/national-id/
    did/               ← thin routing: /api/did/
    holder/            ← thin routing: /api/wallet/
    issuer/            ← thin routing: /api/issuer/ + credential_type_urls.py + template_urls.py + issuance_urls.py
    verifier/          ← thin routing: /api/verifier/
    notifications/     ← thin routing: /api/notifications/
    oid4vci/           ← thin routing: OIDC discovery
    identity/          ← original app (models, migrations, views) — do not rename
    dids/              ← original app (models, migrations, views)
    credentials/       ← original app (models, migrations, views)
    organizations/     ← original app (models, migrations, views)
    verification/      ← original app (models, migrations, views)
    trust_registry/    ← original app
    audit/             ← original app
    admin_portal/      ← original app
    common/            ← shared utilities
```

## sys.path trick
`config/settings/base.py` does `sys.path.insert(0, str(APPS_DIR))` so all apps in `backend/apps/` are importable by bare module name (e.g. `import identity` not `import apps.identity`).

## Workflow port binding
Django dev server must bind to `0.0.0.0:8000` (not `localhost:8000`) for Replit's workflow port monitor to detect it and mark the workflow as running.

**Why:** Replit scans all interfaces; `localhost` (loopback-only) binding is invisible to the external port scanner, causing the workflow to time out even when the server is actually up.

## Issuer URL split
`issuer/urls.py` → `/api/issuer/` (profile/settings/signatories/notifications)
`issuer/credential_type_urls.py` → `/api/credential-types/`
`issuer/template_urls.py` → `/api/templates/`
`issuer/issuance_urls.py` → `/api/issuance/`

These must be separate `.py` files — Django's `include()` cannot traverse `module.list_name` syntax.

## Legacy aliases kept in config/urls.py
- `api/dids/` → dids.urls
- `api/trust-registry/` → trust_registry.urls
- `api/` → identity.urls, credentials.urls

These exist so any existing client code that hasn't been updated yet continues to work.
